documentation.value:
Finds nodes and relationships matching a pattern in the graph.
```cypher
MATCH (n:Person) RETURN n
MATCH (a:Person)-[:KNOWS]->(b:Person) WHERE a.name = 'Alice' RETURN b
MATCH (n) WHERE n.age > 30 RETURN n.name, n.age
```
A graph pattern with nodes `()` and relationships `-[]->`. Labels like `:Person`, properties like `{name: 'Alice'}`.
Optional WHERE clause to filter results.
What to return: nodes, properties, aggregations, aliases.

Creates new nodes and relationships in the graph.
```cypher
CREATE (n:Person {name: 'Alice', age: 30})
CREATE (a)-[:KNOWS {since: 2020}]->(b)
```
A graph pattern describing nodes/relationships to create, with labels and properties.

signatures.label: MERGE (pattern) ON CREATE SET ... ON MATCH SET ...

documentation.value:
Ensures a pattern exists in the graph. Creates it if missing.
```cypher
MERGE (n:Person {name: 'Alice'})
ON CREATE SET n.created = timestamp()
ON MATCH SET n.lastSeen = timestamp()
```
A graph pattern to match or create.
Properties to set when the pattern is newly created.
Properties to set when the pattern already exists.

Updates properties on nodes or relationships.
```cypher
MATCH (n:Person {name: 'Alice'}) SET n.age = 31
MATCH (n) SET n += {updated: true}
```
The node/relationship variable and property to set.
The new value for the property.

Deletes nodes and relationships from the graph.
```cypher
MATCH (n:Temp) DELETE n
MATCH (n)-[r]-() DELETE r, n  -- DETACH DELETE is safer
MATCH (n:Person {name: 'old'}) DETACH DELETE n
```
The node or relationship variable to delete. Use `DETACH DELETE` to also remove relationships.

Removes a property or label from a node or relationship.
```cypher
MATCH (n:Person {name: 'Alice'}) REMOVE n.age
MATCH (n) REMOVE n:Temporary
```
The property to remove, or `variable:Label` to remove a label.

Converts a value to an integer.
```cypher
RETURN toInteger('42')      // 42
RETURN toInteger(3.14)      // 3
```
A string or float value to convert.

Converts a value to a string.
```cypher
RETURN toString(42)         // '42'
RETURN toString(true)       // 'true'
```
Any value to convert to its string representation.

Aggregates values into a list.
```cypher
MATCH (p:Person) RETURN collect(p.name) AS names
MATCH (a)-[:KNOWS]->(b) RETURN a.name, collect(b.name) AS friends
```
The expression to collect into a list.

Returns the number of values (excluding nulls) or rows.
```cypher
MATCH (n:Person) RETURN count(n)
MATCH (n) RETURN count(DISTINCT n.city)
RETURN count(*)
```
The expression to count. Use `*` for all rows, or a specific expression (nulls excluded).

Returns the sum of numeric values.
```cypher
MATCH (o:Order) RETURN sum(o.amount)
```
A numeric expression to sum.

Returns the average of numeric values.
```cypher
MATCH (p:Person) RETURN avg(p.age)
```
A numeric expression to average.

Returns the number of elements in a list or the length of a string.
```cypher
RETURN size([1, 2, 3])       // 3
RETURN size('hello')         // 5
MATCH (a) RETURN a.name, size((a)-->()) AS degree
```
A list, string, or pattern expression.
